#!/bin/sh
# Find PIDs whose mountinfo references the /data/shangyin lowerdir, then
# for each lowerdir print whether it exists and, if so, run du inside that PID's mount ns.
for p in /proc/[0-9]*; do
  pid=${p#/proc/}
  if grep -q 'lowerdir=/data/shangyin' "$p/mountinfo" 2>/dev/null; then
    printf 'FOUND PID:%s CMD=\"%s\" MNTNS=%s\n' "$pid" "$(ps -p "$pid" -o comm= 2>/dev/null)" "$(readlink /proc/$pid/ns/mnt 2>/dev/null)"
    lower=$(awk '/ lowerdir=/{ if(match($0,/lowerdir=[^, ]*/)){s=substr($0,RSTART+8,RLENGTH-8); print s}}' "$p/mountinfo")
    echo "$lower" | tr ':' '\n' | while read -r d; do
      [ -z "$d" ] && continue
      echo "== $d =="
      if [ -d "$d" ]; then
        if command -v nsenter >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          nsenter -t "$pid" -m -- sh -c "du -sh \"$d\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'du failed on $d'"
        else
          echo "nsenter not found; to inspect manually run as root on the host: nsenter -t $pid -m -- du -sh $d"
        fi
      else
        echo "MISSING: $d"
      fi
    done
  fi
done
EOF

#!/bin/sh
# Find PIDs whose mountinfo references the /data/shangyin lowerdir, then
